instruction: 把项目任务情况汇总一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '任务名'
ws['B1'] = '负责人'
ws['C1'] = '优先级'
ws['D1'] = '完成状态'
ws['A2'] = '需求评审'
ws['B2'] = '李明'
ws['C2'] = '高'
ws['D2'] = '已完成'
ws['A3'] = 'UI设计'
ws['B3'] = '王芳'
ws['C3'] = '高'
ws['D3'] = '进行中'
ws['A4'] = '后端开发'
ws['B4'] = '张强'
ws['C4'] = '高'
ws['D4'] = '进行中'
ws['A5'] = '测试'
ws['B5'] = '陈明'
ws['C5'] = '中'
ws['D5'] = '未开始'
ws['A6'] = '上线部署'
ws['B6'] = '刘明'
ws['C6'] = '低'
ws['D6'] = '未开始'
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/team_tasks.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 把项目任务情况汇总一下
从/home/user/Desktop/team_tasks.xlsx中统计高优先级且未完成的任务数量，在/home/user/Desktop/task_overview.txt末尾追加：'高优先级未完成任务：2项'，保存

include: 高优先级未完成任务：2项
